name: nopal-e2e-tauri
description: WebdriverIO + tauri-driver harness for the Nopal REQ-F5 Tauri E2E specs (RFC 0112, Step 7). Scoped separately from the Playwright web suite so its heavy WebDriver deps never enter the per-PR `just e2e` install. `tauri-driver` itself is a Cargo binary (`cargo install tauri-driver`), not an npm package — see README.md.
